evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.
Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes NLP, recommendation systems, feature engineering, MLflow, Kubeflow, Pinecone, OpenAI embeddings, BLEU/ROUGE metrics
evidence.source_text: Strong background in NLP, recommendation systems... feature pipeline (~200 features)... MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration... OpenAI embeddings... BLEU, ROUGE

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
